strengths: 15+ years of fullstack experience with deep TypeScript, Node.js, and React proficiency demonstrated across multiple production roles (Optilyz, RIDE Capital, re:cinq)
Active AI agent and MCP infrastructure development at current role (re:cinq), directly matching the role's AI agent development requirement
Exceptional testing culture: TDD practitioner, created open-source testing libraries (Fluent-Asserts, Trial), organized code katas and TDD/Selenium workshops
concerns: NestJS is not mentioned anywhere in the resume despite being the primary backend framework in the required stack
Kotlin is absent from listed skills; Java appears only in non-web contexts (robotic arms, mobile device orchestration at Altom)
Security and authentication experience is not explicitly addressed in any role or project description
response.justification: Bogdan brings over 15 years of fullstack development with strong TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS CDK, Docker, and Kubernetes experience — all directly relevant to the role. His current position at re:cinq explicitly involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, satisfying the AI agent development requirement with concrete evidence. His testing discipline is exceptional: he authored open-source testing frameworks and organized TDD workshops, signaling the engineering quality the role demands. The primary gap is NestJS, which is the stated backend framework and does not appear on the resume; this is mitigable given his depth with Node.js ecosystems and event-driven architectures. Kotlin is also absent, though Java appears in limited scope. Security and authentication go unaddressed in the resume, a mild concern given they are listed as required skills. Seniority, cloud and container fluency, polyglot range, and current AI tooling work collectively outweigh these gaps.
